ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey focus and purpose */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., immigration attitudes, guest worker programs) */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used to conduct the survey (e.g., online, phone, in-person) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of respondents in the survey */,
  "margin_of_error" TEXT /* Margin of error for the survey results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey to which the response belongs */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent providing the answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question being answered */,
  "political_affiliation" TEXT /* Political affiliation of the respondent (e.g., Conservative, Moderate, Liberal) */,
  "response_value" INTEGER /* Value of the response provided */,
  "response_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the response (e.g., 1-5, 1-10) */,
  "response_open-ended" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the response is open-ended or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey that includes this question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question being asked */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended, rating scale) */,
  "question_importance" TEXT /* Importance level of the question (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent */,
  "political_affiliation" TEXT /* Political affiliation of the respondent (e.g., Conservative, Moderate, Liberal) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education of the respondent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income of the respondent */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "summary_statistics" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary statistic entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with this summary */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question for which the statistics are provided */,
  "conservative_count" INTEGER /* Number of Conservative responses */,
  "moderate_count" INTEGER /* Number of Moderate responses */,
  "liberal_count" INTEGER /* Number of Liberal responses */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of responses */,
  "average_response" TEXT /* Average response value for the question */,
  "standard_deviation" TEXT /* Standard deviation of the response values for the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_summary_statistics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_summary_statistics_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregated_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated data entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey for which the data is aggregated */,
  "total_conservative" INTEGER /* Total number of Conservative responses across questions */,
  "total_moderate" INTEGER /* Total number of Moderate responses across questions */,
  "total_liberal" INTEGER /* Total number of Liberal responses across questions */,
  "overall_total" INTEGER /* Overall total responses for the survey */,
  "average_conservative" TEXT /* Average response value for Conservative respondents */,
  "average_moderate" TEXT /* Average response value for Moderate respondents */,
  "average_liberal" TEXT /* Average response value for Liberal respondents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregated_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
